Title: Verify the main flows of the activity diagram
Test Steps:
1. Start the application.
2. Check if the user is directed to the login page.
3. Enter valid login credentials and click on the login button.
4. Check if the user is directed to the home page.
5. Click on the register button.
6. Enter valid registration information and click on the register button.
7. Check if the user is directed to the home page.
Expected Result: The user is able to log in and register successfully, and is directed to the home page after each action.

Title: Verify the main flow of the sequence diagram
Preconditions: The user sends a request to the application.
Test Steps:
1. The user sends a request to the application.
2. The application sends the request to the server.
3. The server sends the request to the database.
4. The database sends the response back to the server.
5. The server sends the response back to the application.
6. The application sends the response back to the user.
Expected Result: The user receives the response from the application after the request is processed by the server and the database.

Title: Verify the main flows of the use case diagram
Preconditions: The user is ready to interact with the system.
Test Steps:
1. The user initiates the login process.
2. The system authenticates the user.
3. The user is logged in and directed to the home page.
4. The user initiates the registration process.
5. The user is registered and directed to the home page.
6. The user views their profile.
7. The user logs out.
8. The user navigates through the menu.
Expected Result: The user is able to log in, register, view their profile, log out, and navigate through the menu as expected.

Title: Verify the main flows of the state machine diagram
Preconditions: The system is ready to process data.
Expected Result: The system processes the data as expected.

Title: Verify the deployment of the system components
Test Steps:
1. Check if the application, server, and database are deployed correctly.
2. Check if the communication between the components is established.
Expected Result: The system components are deployed correctly and can communicate with each other as expected.

Title: Verify the objects and associations in the object diagram
Preconditions: The objects and associations are defined.
Test Steps: 1. Check if the objects and associations are defined correctly.
Expected Result: The objects and associations are defined correctly.
